title: Investor Narrative Foundations
shortSummary: Build stronger investor narrative foundations judgment so capital / fundraising work becomes clearer, more repeatable, and easier to lead.
whyItMatters: Investor Narrative Foundations is a leverage point inside capital / fundraising. It supports the broader goal of fundraising, capital allocation, investor relations, and financial strategy.
coreConcepts: Investor Narrative Foundations needs clear definitions before it can become a reliable operating system.
Good investor narrative foundations work depends on better signal, better sequencing, and cleaner ownership.
Investor Narrative Foundations should reduce rework and improve the quality of decisions across the business.
